title: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - 211info
text: LA CLINICA CENTRAL POINT HEALTH CENTER GENERAL MEDICAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive health care for the entire family. Services include well baby and child check-ups, annual exams and physicals, immunizations, PAP tests, STD/STI screening and treatment, reproductive health services including contraception, and care for chronic conditions. Pharmacy is open to the community and offers patient discounts. 4940 Hamrick Road Central Point, OR 97502 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Temporary hours:Monday-Friday 7am-5pm Email (541) 618-1300 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Appointments (541) 618-1300 After-hours nurse line (541) 535-6239 Main phone (541) 690-3600 Care team Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurances. Sliding scale fees based on income and family size for patients with no health insurance. No one is turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7am-5pm Services: Childhood Immunization Community Clinics General Medical Care General Physical Examinations Obstetrics/Gynecology Pap Tests Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON CONTRACEPTIVE CARE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH CARE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES SPECIALTY MEDICINE - GENERAL DENTAL CARE SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
